project.name: CloudShift
project.description: Enterprise SaaS platform for migrating files between cloud storage providers using a .NET backend, worker processing, and Angular frontend. Note: this project has over 100 source files; consider scoping analysis to a subdirectory for faster results.

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Project documentation, agent instructions, and architecture notes.

layers.name: Solution Configuration
layers.description: Build, launch, package, and workspace configuration for backend and frontend projects.

layers.name: Backend API
layers.description: ASP.NET Core API host and controllers that expose CloudShift operations.

layers.name: Application Layer
layers.description: CQRS commands, queries, DTOs, interfaces, handlers, and application models.

layers.name: Domain Layer
layers.description: Core entities, enums, and integration messages with minimal dependencies.

layers.name: Infrastructure Layer
layers.description: EF Core DbContext, migrations, repositories, and MassTransit publisher implementations.

layers.name: Worker Service
layers.description: Background worker host, consumers, and storage provider implementations.

layers.name: Angular Frontend
layers.description: Angular app bootstrap, routes, layout, features, services, models, and shared components.

tour.title: Project Architecture
tour.description: Start with the architecture document to understand CloudShift goals, Clean Architecture layout, and migration constraints.

tour.title: API Bootstrap
tour.description: Review how the Web API wires application services, infrastructure, EF Core migrations, RabbitMQ, Swagger, and CORS.

tour.title: Domain Model
tour.description: Inspect the core domain entities that represent profiles, mappings, jobs, and transfer logs.

tour.title: CQRS Workflow
tour.description: Follow a migration command through the application layer into repository and event-publishing abstractions.

tour.title: Background Processing
tour.description: See how the worker consumes migration job messages and coordinates transfer execution.

tour.title: Frontend Routing
tour.description: Map Angular routes to CloudShift dashboard, profile, mapping, job, and settings screens.

tour.title: Frontend API Client
tour.description: Review how the Angular UI talks to backend profile, mapping, and migration job endpoints.
